description: As part of an environmental inspection, an officer must check a vessel's garbage and oil record books for compliance.

nodes.task_description: Board a vessel to conduct a routine Port State Control inspection.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer boards the vessel for an inspection.

nodes.task_description: Request to see the vessel's Oil Record Book and Garbage Record Book.

expected_outcome.expected: The vessel's Chief Officer provides the logbooks.

nodes.task_description: Review the books to ensure all waste disposal has been logged correctly and receipts from shore facilities are present.

expected_outcome.expected: The officer checks the logs and finds them to be in full compliance with MARPOL regulations.
